title: Christmas Spirit Pack
description: Christmas spirit in Minecraft. Changed mob, block and item textures to give a cozy look and make you hyped for christmas! ;-)
body:
This resource pack by jannik6879 gives you a Christmassy design 🎅🏻 in Minecraft. Textures like leaves🎄, grass, chests and signs are changed. In addition, the zombie, skeleton and stray gets a festive and cozy look. Not only has the texture of the cookie been changed, it is now also called speculoos to match its design. To have a better idea of the changed textures have a look at the screenshots i uploaded. 🙂

These Textures has been changed:

Cookie --> Speculoos
Zombie
Skeleton
Stray
Bow + Arrow
small/large Chest
All kind of leaves
All kind of signs
Grass Block (As seen in the picture), Podzol, Mycelium
(Pale)Moss Block and carpet
Glass Block / Glass Pane
small/large Grass
small/large Fern
Sugar Cane
All kind of flowers and Leaf Litter
Bamboo
All kind of saplings
Pale Oak and Cherry Leave particles

If you have an idea for some other textures i should edit, just write an comment, I´ll have a look at it. 🙂
